title: Phosphate Buffered Saline (PBS)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"27ktn","text":"Phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) is a buffer solution (pH ~7.4) commonly used in biological research. It is a water-based salt solution containing disodium hydrogen phosphate, sodium chloride and optionally, potassium chloride and potassium dihydrogen phosphate. The buffer helps to maintain a constant pH. PBS has many uses because it is isotonic and non-toxic to most cells[1].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":374,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":374,"length":3}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"A41AB0F08DF511EDBD13EF5B75235669","url":"https://doi.org/10.1016/S1355-0306(06)71591-X"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"81lc5","text":"Follow step by step, unless stated otherwise. Equipment needed should be standard to a microbiology lab.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"1qelg","text":"Prepare glassware by cleaning it, and ensure that scale is sufficiently calibrated","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"f6iud","text":"When removing autoclaved components, be sure to take care as this can be very hot.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"a2nqd","text":"Analytical scale, autoclave, bottle, weight vessel, LAF bench","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: All compounds are measured using a high precision analytical scale from powdered compounds. Each compound is measured to within 1% of the target weight. All compounds are mixed in a Duran bottle
Fill the bottle with 50 mL double-distilled water

Measure 8000 mg Sodium chloride, 200 mg Potassium chloride, 144 mg Disodium phosphate and 245 mg Monopotassium phosphatePowdered compounds: Sodium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9625 Potassium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P3911 Disodium phosphate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9763 Monopotassium phosphate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P5379
Add powdered solids into bottle, and use a magnetic mixer with a stir bar to mix for 00:05:00
Adjust pH while mixing to pH 7.4 using concentrated sodium hydroxide
Add distilled water to a total of 100 mL
creator: Andreas Sagen
